My family and I really liked this bed especially my daughter as I got it for her as one of her birthday gifts. However, overtime, I noticed everybody who slept in. It kept having bites appear on them, but I couldn't figure out how or where it was from, well I slept on it last night with my son and we both got bitSure what type of bikes they are and hoping it's not any bedbugs that were brought into my home

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the categories of negative feedback mentioned are:

1. Bed causing bites: The users experienced bites after sleeping on the bed, and they are unsure of the source or whether it might be bedbugs.

I wish it could be folded and stored somehow. Just so big and cumbersome! Great for my son's friend to have sleepover but no place to put it and takes up so much space on the floor!

It said it was a "human" dog bed but we couldn't find any human that could sleep in it.  It doesn't have any support and they described it as just sleeping on the ground. We asked different people of sizes and weights to try it. The blanket it comes with is very soft but that is an expensive blanket.  We got a coupon on it so I thought it was worth a try but it was unusable.  We don't have a dog, but they may have liked it.  Company only offered a 40.00 discount but we would have still wasted significant money on a unusable item.  There is also no way to get it back in the box and you can't send it back without the box.  After perseverance working with Amazon they made it right.  The company should really not accept returns since it seems impossible to return.

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the categories of negative feedback mentioned are:

1. Misleading description: The bed was advertised as a "human" dog bed, but it was found to be unsuitable for humans to sleep on. It lacked support and was like sleeping on the ground.
2. Expensive blanket: The blanket included with the bed was viewed as being of high quality, but it was considered too expensive.
3. Unusable item: Despite purchasing the bed with a coupon, it was found to be unusable for the reviewer.
4. Inadequate refund: The company only offered a $40 discount, which was not considered sufficient to compensate for the unusable item and wasted money.
5. Difficult return process: The bed couldn't be easily packed back into the box, making it challenging to return. The reviewer mentions having to work with Amazon to resolve the issue.

Please let me know if there is any other information you would like me to extract from the product review.

Big enough to sleep in , but way too hard to sleep in! Might not be so hard if you only weigh 98lbs? I certainly didn't feel any memory foam in it, though! Oh, and it swoll up with so much air after i opened it, that to return it, I had to put it in the box my big washing machine came in. Hope UPS takes it!

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the categories of negative feedback mentioned are:

1. Uncomfortable sleeping surface: The bed is described as being too hard to sleep on, particularly for individuals who are not lightweight (i.e., weighing more than 98lbs).
2. Lack of memory foam: The reviewer did not feel any presence of memory foam in the bed, suggesting that it might not provide the expected level of comfort.
3. Difficulty with return: The bed swelled up with air after opening, making it challenging to fit it back in the original box. The reviewer hopes that the shipping carrier, UPS, will accept the return.

Make sure you read thoroughly about the products size and color! It's  advertised as a bed for dogs. When I realized my dog didn't like the bed, which never has happened before, I looked into the description of what was being advertised. I noticed that different sizes and colors are for cats. It's very misleading! And I can't refund or replace the item since it has been opened and used. What a waste of money! So just make sure you know what you're buying. The other reason I gave it 1 star is because my poor little dog has been either sleeping on the floor with her blanket or when she does use the bed, most of her body is on the floor because it doesn't have the proper support for a dog's neck/head, and I'm positive it has to do with the fact that it's a small bed for cats!!

Based on the provided Amazon product review, the categories of negative feedback mentioned are:

1. Misleading product description: The reviewer states that the product was advertised as a dog bed but found out that different sizes and colors are meant for cats, leading to confusion and a mistaken purchase.
2. Inability to refund or replace: Since the item has been opened and used, the reviewer expresses frustration with not being able to return or get a replacement for the product.
3. Lack of proper support: The bed is criticized for not providing adequate support for a dog's neck/head, likely due to it being designed as a small bed for cats.
4. Waste of money: The reviewer feels that purchasing the bed was a waste of money due to the misleading product description and lack of proper support for their dog.

Please let me know if there is any other information you would like me to extract from the product review.
